/usr/bin/cc -g CMakeFiles/soes_slave_simulator.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/soes_slave_simulator.dir/src/esc_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/soes_slave_simulator.dir/src/app_process.c.o CMakeFiles/soes_slave_simulator.dir/src/sdo_objects.c.o CMakeFiles/soes_slave_simulator.dir/src/pcap_emulator.c.o -o soes_slave_simulator   -L/mnt/shared/SOES/soes_slave_simulator/3rd/SOES/soes  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/shared/SOES/soes_slave_simulator/3rd/SOES/soes 3rd/SOES/soes/libsoes.a -lpthread -lpcap
